The '''A14 Repulsorlift Disk''' was a simple, utilitarian one-person [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] craft. It was developed by the [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech Repulsor Company]] and could be used for construction work, among other uses.
